questions.question: What is the primary definition of production?
options: The act of consuming goods and services
The creation of utility or goods and services to satisfy human wants
The distribution of finished goods to consumers
The extraction of raw materials from nature
questions.correct: The creation of utility or goods and services to satisfy human wants
questions.question: Which of the following is NOT a type of production?
Primary production refers to:
options: The conversion of raw materials into finished goods
The provision of professional or commercial services
The extraction of raw materials provided by nature
The marketing of goods and services
questions.correct: The extraction of raw materials provided by nature
questions.question: Which of the following is an importance of production?
options: Improvement in the standard of living
Limiting the availability of goods and services
questions.correct: Improvement in the standard of living
questions.question: What is the primary purpose of an occupation?
Which of the following is an example of a primary or extractive occupation?
Indirect service occupations are usually paid by:
Which of the following is an attribute of truthfulness?
What does ethics generally refer to?
options: A set of principles guiding right and wrong decisions
questions.correct: A set of principles guiding right and wrong decisions
questions.question: Which of the following is an ethical requirement for sourcing chemicals?
options: Sourcing through licensed vendors with high integrity
Allowing food in chemical storage areas
questions.correct: Sourcing through licensed vendors with high integrity
questions.question: Hazardous chemicals such as acids and pesticides should be supplied to:
options: Users with high integrity who will put them to constructive use
questions.correct: Users with high integrity who will put them to constructive use
questions.question: Which of the following is a guideline for handling chemicals?
options: Keep boxes containing chemicals closed during storage
Allow eating inside the storage area
questions.correct: Keep boxes containing chemicals closed during storage
